     };
   };
+  "/users/{id}/preferences": {
+    get: {
+      parameters: { path: { id: string } };
+      responses: {
+        200: { content: { "application/json": components["schemas"]["Preferences"] } };
+        404: { content: { "application/json": components["schemas"]["Error"] } };
+      };
+    };
+    put: {
+      parameters: { path: { id: string } };
+      requestBody: { content: { "application/json": components["schemas"]["Preferences"] } };
+      responses: {
+        204: never;
+        400: { content: { "application/json": components["schemas"]["Error"] } };
+      };
+    };
+  };
 }

 export interface components {
   schemas: {
+    Preferences: {
+      timezone: string;
+      locale: string;
+      newsletterOptIn: boolean;
+    };
     User: { id: string; email: string };
     Error: { code: number; message: string };
   };
